a=0000 & b2=0110 -> y=0000
a=0001 & b2=0110 -> y=0000
a=0010 & b2=0110 -> y=0010
a=0011 & b2=0110 -> y=0010
a=0100 & b2=0110 -> y=0100
a=0101 & b2=0110 -> y=0100
a=0110 & b2=0110 -> y=0110
a=0111 & b2=0110 -> y=0110
a=1000 & b2=0110 -> y=0000
a=1001 & b2=0110 -> y=0000
a=1010 & b2=0110 -> y=0010
a=1011 & b2=0110 -> y=0010
a=1100 & b2=0110 -> y=0100
a=1101 & b2=0110 -> y=0100
a=1110 & b2=0110 -> y=0110
a=1111 & b2=0110 -> y=0110
bus AND4: all passed
